message:
refactor(bv): migrate from bd to br (beads_rust) CLI

Update the beads integration to use the new br (beads_rust) binary
instead of the deprecated bd command:

- Change exec.CommandContext to invoke "br" instead of "bd"
- Update all error messages to reference "br" command
- Update isNoBeadsDBError to detect "br --no-db" suggestion
- Update IsBdInstalled to check for "br" in PATH
- Preserve legacy function name for API compatibility

This migration aligns with the beads_rust project becoming the primary
issue tracker implementation, replacing the original Python-based beads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
